productDisplayName: Fila Men's Rowley White Red Shoe
description: Grab the racquet and get going with the top Spin shoe from fila. A great tennis and indoor sport shoe, the Top Spin's stylish look also allows you to team it with jeans and casual t-shirts for that uber cool look.Upper synthetic leather upper with perforations on the toe box and along the mouth for maximum durability, breathability and comfort Reinforced synthetic overlays across the toe box and heel for enhanced durability and added shoe structure Perforated tongue with a fabric inner lining for durability and breathability, offering a snug Fit Cushioned sockliner for in-step comfort Lace-up system for snug fit and to lock the foot in place Cotton twill laces for comfort Brand badge on lateral side and embroidered branding on the heel for style Midsole Phylon midsole for lightweight comfort and shock absorption Cushioned footbed for comfort Removable footbed to accommodate an orthotic Outsole TPR outsole for maximum durability Pivot point on big toe mound for easy 180 degree movement of foot Circular grooves on the heel and horizontal grooves along the forefoot for easy turning of the foot without injuring the ankle Non-marking lugs for added traction and grip Shoe careRub surface using a damp clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine washStore away from direct sunlight
